# Pull request

## Summary

Describe the change in one or two sentences.

## Type of change

- [ ] Documentation
- [ ] Example
- [ ] Module wording
- [ ] Platform adaptation
- [ ] Safety clarification
- [ ] Other:

## Affected area

- [ ] `defense/`
- [ ] `continuity/`
- [ ] `quality/`
- [ ] `review/`
- [ ] `watchdog/`
- [ ] `docs/`
- [ ] `examples/`
- [ ] Repository maintenance

## Safety checklist

- [ ] No real credentials, tokens, keys, or private logs are included.
- [ ] No private file paths, private repository names, or private conversation history are included.
- [ ] No hidden instructions are added.
- [ ] Security claims include honest limits.
- [ ] Platform-specific behavior is labeled as platform-specific.
- [ ] Examples use synthetic or redacted data only.

## Verification

Explain how you checked the change.

- [ ] Links and filenames checked
- [ ] Markdown reviewed
- [ ] Examples are copyable
- [ ] Module names remain consistent
- [ ] Not applicable:

## Notes for reviewers

List open questions, tradeoffs, or areas that need closer review.
